## What I Just Did
Prepared the Iteration 002 review-signoff evidence.

## Why I Stopped
The retro decision requires a human verdict.

## What Needs Your Review
Review the signoff evidence and decide whether to enter retro.

## What Happens Next
A human approval would authorize only review-signoff to retro.

## Discussion Prompts
No open prompt.

## What I Need From You
Reply with approved for retro, send back, or discuss.

Specrew: boundary state is pending, but your last message did not expose the verdict marker. AWAITING YOUR VERDICT: if you already approved, please re-confirm. Give the boundary verdict to authorize it.
